title: euphorbia × peisonis
intro: Euphorbia × peisonis, also known as the Pencil Tree, is a hybrid species derived from the Euphorbia tirucalli and Euphorbia lactea plants. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The Pencil Tree is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Euphorbia × peisonis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and effective treatment option.
